title: centaurea × beckeriana
intro: Centaurea × beckeriana, also known as Becker's cornflower or Knapweed, is a hybrid plant species in the daisy family. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The plant has been associated with several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, relieving symptoms of menopause, and supporting the immune system. Centaurea × beckeriana can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be administered orally or topically.
